g.text: 01 / BUJIBO.AI
AI-powered database chat platform that turns natural language into live answers, charts, and reports.
Solo-founded product with secure auth and real-time processing — applied to Y Combinator and Entrepreneur First.
REACT · TYPESCRIPT · FASTAPI · PYTHON · AI CHAT · SOLO FOUNDER
02 / FOOTPRINTIQ PLATFORM
Carbon emission management system with AI-driven dashboards, automated PPTX reporting, and client integrations.
Optimized AWS data pipelines and cut monthly infrastructure cost from $6K to $400 while keeping reliability.
NEXT.JS · PRISMA · POSTGRESQL · GROQ · LLAMA · LANGCHAIN · AWS
03 / AI VOICE INTERVIEW
AI-powered voice hiring system for automated candidate screening with dynamic Q&A and evaluation.
Recruiter dashboard with scores and summaries; Node.js backend for real-time APIs and webhooks.
NEXT.JS · NODE.JS · GROQ · LLM VOICE AGENTS · WEBHOOKS
04 / STOREILY
Full-stack web and mobile social/commerce platform built at Worxstax — auth, onboarding, and guest access.
Neo4j social graph, real-time notifications via AWS Lambda and Firebase, plus a custom image editor.
ANGULAR · IONIC · NEST.JS · MONGODB · NEO4J · FIREBASE · AWS LAMBDA
05 / VACCINE CARE
IoT temperature monitoring system for vaccine storage with live tabular and graphical dashboards.
Automated alert backend using Twilio and Firebase for instant notifications when thresholds breach.
IOT · FIREBASE · TWILIO · REAL-TIME DASHBOARD · ALERTS
06 / REAL-TIME MQTT PIPELINES
High-velocity data ingestion and analytics layer for FootprintIQ client integrations and live reporting.
Materialized views and MQTT pipelines handling continuous streams for production sustainability dashboards.
MQTT · AWS IOT · POSTGRESQL · MATERIALIZED VIEWS · REAL-TIME
